tasks.description: Add 1MB request body limits to all API handlers
steps: HandleCreate wraps r.Body with http.MaxBytesReader(w, r.Body, 1<<20)
HandleCallback wraps r.Body with http.MaxBytesReader
HandleClarificationAnswer wraps r.Body with http.MaxBytesReader
Requests exceeding 1MB return 400 Bad Request
Test HandleCreate rejects body > 1MB with 400
Test HandleCreate accepts valid body < 1MB (verify no regression)

tasks.description: Add task content length validation at API level
steps: Constant MaxTaskLength = 10000 defined in orchestrator API package
HandleCreate rejects tasks exceeding MaxTaskLength with 400 and code TASK_TOO_LONG
Test HandleCreate rejects task > 10,000 chars with TASK_TOO_LONG

tasks.description: Validate clarification replies come from original requester
steps: GetByClarificationMessageID query JOINs users table to include discord_id
HandleGetByClarificationMessageID response includes discord_user_id field
MinionByClarificationResponse struct in discord-bot includes DiscordUserID *string field
HandleReply validates minion.DiscordUserID != nil && *minion.DiscordUserID == m.Author.ID
Non-matching users receive warning: Only the original requester can answer clarification questions
Test HandleGetByClarificationMessageID returns discord_user_id from joined user
Test clarification reply from wrong user is rejected with warning message
Test clarification reply from original user succeeds

tasks.description: Discord bot handlers use timeout contexts instead of context.Background()
steps: Constant OperationTimeout = 30 * time.Second defined in handler package
Handle method uses context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), OperationTimeout) for orchestrator calls
HandleReply method uses timeout context for orchestrator calls
All timeout contexts have defer cancel() to prevent leaks
Test context cancellation propagates to orchestrator client calls

tasks.description: Error matching uses errors.Is() instead of string comparison
steps: Functions isErrorType, containsError, containsSubstring deleted from message.go
handleParseError uses errors.Is(err, command.ErrMissingRepo) pattern
All error type checks in message.go use standard library functions

tasks.description: Kill OpenCode process on task timeout
steps: OpenCode PID captured when process starts (variable OPENCODE_PID)
kill $OPENCODE_PID 2>/dev/null || true called when task times out
Cleanup is best-effort (errors suppressed, doesn't affect exit code)
Manual verification: devbox kills OpenCode on timeout (check pod logs)
RateLimitError struct deleted from orchestrator/internal/api/minions.go
IsRateLimitError function deleted
Custom itoa function deleted from orchestrator/internal/db/minions.go
All itoa calls replaced with strconv.Itoa() (already imported)

tasks.description: Extract duplicate scan patterns to helper function
steps: scanMinion(row pgx.Row) (*Minion, error) helper function created
Helper scans all 22 fields in correct order matching SELECT columns

9 full-minion queries refactored to use helper: FindRecentDuplicate, GetByID, List, ListByStatuses, ListPending, ListIdleRunning, ListClarificationTimeouts, GetByClarificationMessageID, ListTerminalWithPodOlderThan
Partial-select queries (Terminate, Complete) remain inline (different column sets)
Test scanMinion helper correctly populates all 22 fields
Verify Terminate and Complete queries still work correctly (different column sets)

tasks.description: Remove thinking emoji after processing completes
steps: Handle adds defer s.MessageReactionRemove(...) after successful minion creation/clarification
HandleReply adds defer after successful answer processing
Emoji removal failures logged at Debug level (cosmetic, not Error)
Manual verification: thinking emoji removed after successful minion spawn
Manual verification: thinking emoji removed after failed minion spawn

tasks.description: Final validation: all existing tests pass and services build successfully
steps: NOTE: This task should run after all other tasks complete
Run go test ./... in orchestrator - all tests pass
Run go test ./... in discord-bot - all tests pass
Run go build ./... in orchestrator - builds successfully
Run go build ./... in discord-bot - builds successfully

patterns: Context usage: orchestrator/internal/api/minions.go:321 uses r.Context() for DB operations
Error handling: discord-bot/internal/handler/message.go:358 uses errors.Is() for some checks
nonGoals: Git credential cleanup trap in devbox
